store_headline: WooCommerce Theme for Fashion Boutiques and Luxury Retailers
store_subheadline: Sell fashion online with lookbooks, quickview, wishlists, and an AJAX cart built in.
features: Elegant and modern WooCommerce design with sophisticated aesthetics
Multiple concept layouts for diverse retail approaches
Advanced product quickview and wishlist functionality
Variation swatches for colors, sizes, and product attributes
Portfolio integration for brand storytelling and lookbooks
WPBakery Page Builder with custom e-commerce content blocks
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Video thumbnail generation for product demonstrations
Ajax shopping cart and streamlined checkout process
Product zoom and detailed gallery views
Responsive design optimized for all devices
One-click demo import with complete elegant store setups
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: "Don't Do Fashion, Be Fashion" — the brand statement is baked into the theme's DNA, not a preset
Minimal white-space editorial layouts communicate luxury through restraint — the design language of houses that charge full price
AJAX cart, wishlist, and quickview deliver the premium shopping UX luxury customers expect without page reloads
The most aspirational fashion theme in the catalog — above Morvan's boutique and separate from Alceste's streetwear identity
Lookbook integration for editorial product storytelling that sells aspiration, not just product
WPBakery with luxury fashion-specific layouts means the store looks intentional, not assembled
Product variation swatches and zoom put finishing details in focus — luxury buyers look closely
key_benefits: Sell fashion at full price inside an aesthetic that signals premium value
Attract editorial shoppers and convert them with a shopping UX that matches
Build a luxury fashion storefront that looks designed, not templated
Convert aspirational browsers into buyers with quickview, wishlist, and AJAX cart
Launch a high-end lookbook that positions products as identity, not inventory
Establish a fashion brand that competes visually with labels spending far more
design_features: Multiple elegant concept layouts for different brand styles
High-end product gallery and zoom functionality
Newsletter signup forms with elegant styling
Ajax shopping cart with smooth animations
Modern product filtering and search functionality
use_cases: Designer Home Decor and Lifestyle Brands

testimonials.text: Super sleek and classy theme, love it! Truly deserves more recognition.
testimonials.author: ShoArsh

testimonials.text: Customer service absolutely fantastic. Kind, impeccable and fast support. BOSS!!!
testimonials.author: truebag

testimonials.text: The theme loos great, it stands out from the rest! Customer support is excellent: quick and productive! Open for suggestions!
testimonials.author: DamsonDD
